title: BrainBox Gamified Educational Platform - Frontend Implementation

requirements.summary: Create animated welcome screen with branding and call-to-action button
acceptanceCriteria: Welcome screen displays the exact text 'Welcome to BrainBox! 🧠⚡'
Tagline 'Charge Your Brain. Unlock Your Game.' is visible
Bold 'Let's Start' button triggers onboarding flow
Screen includes smooth animations and transitions

file_operations.description: Create animated welcome screen component displaying the generated hero image from frontend/public/assets/generated/brainbox-hero.dim_1200x600.png, headline 'Welcome to BrainBox! 🧠⚡', tagline 'Charge Your Brain. Unlock Your Game.', and a bold 'Let's Start' button with smooth fade-in animations and scale transitions using Tailwind CSS animate utilities
Add route for WelcomeScreen as the landing page and configure navigation to onboarding flow when 'Let's Start' button is clicked

requirements.summary: Implement multi-step onboarding flow for grade, educational system, and stream selection
acceptanceCriteria: Grade selection dropdown shows grades 1 through 12
Educational system selection shows CBSE, ICSE, State Board, IB, IGCSE, and Other
For grades 11-12, additional stream selection appears (Science, Commerce, Humanities)
Selected preferences are stored in user profile

file_operations.description: Create multi-step onboarding component with three steps: grade selection (1-12), educational system selection (CBSE, ICSE, State Board, IB, IGCSE, Other), and conditional stream selection for grades 11-12 (Science, Commerce, Humanities). Use shadcn/ui Select components for dropdowns and Button components for navigation between steps
Create grade selector component with dropdown showing grades 1-12 using shadcn/ui Select component with proper styling
Create educational system selector component with dropdown for CBSE, ICSE, State Board, IB, IGCSE, and Other using shadcn/ui Select component
Create conditional stream selector component that only appears for grades 11-12, offering Science, Commerce, and Humanities options using shadcn/ui Select component
Create custom hook to manage user profile state and call backend's createUserProfile method with selected grade, educationalSystem, and stream values. Handle loading states and errors appropriately
Add route for OnboardingFlow component and configure navigation from WelcomeScreen to onboarding and from onboarding to dashboard upon completion

requirements.summary: Display appropriate subject list based on selected grade and stream
acceptanceCriteria: Subject list automatically populates based on grade selection
Grades 1-5 show 5 subjects as specified
Grades 6-8 show 5 subjects as specified
Grades 9-10 show 7 subjects as specified
Grades 11-12 show stream-specific subjects
Subject cards appear on dashboard after onboarding

file_operations.description: Create utility function that generates appropriate subject list based on grade and stream: Grades 1-5 (English, Mathematics, EVS, General Knowledge, Computer Basics), Grades 6-8 (English, Mathematics, Science, Social Studies, Computer Science), Grades 9-10 (English, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Social Science, Computer Science), Grades 11-12 Science (Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Mathematics, Computer Science), Grades 11-12 Commerce (Accounts, Business Studies, Economics, Mathematics), Grades 11-12 Humanities (History, Political Science, Geography, etc.)
Create subject card component displaying subject name, icon, progress indicator, and mastery level using shadcn/ui Card component. Make cards clickable to navigate to subject learning view
Create subject grid component that displays generated subject cards in a responsive grid layout using the subjectGenerator utility to determine which subjects to show based on user profile

requirements.summary: Implement Energy Meter display and real-time updates
acceptanceCriteria: Correct answers award +5 energy immediately
Completed quiz sets award +20 energy
Study timer tracks time and awards +10 energy per 15-minute session
Daily streak counter awards bonus energy
Energy meter updates in real-time on dashboard
All energy transactions are stored persistently

file_operations.description: Create animated energy meter component displaying current energy level using the generated icon from frontend/public/assets/generated/energy-icon.dim_128x128.png. Include animated progress bar with glowing effect, energy value display, and smooth transitions when energy changes. Use shadcn/ui Progress component for the bar

Create custom hook to manage energy state, track energy transactions (+5 per correct answer, +20 per completed quiz, +10 per 15-minute study session), calculate combo bonuses, and persist energy data. Include methods to award energy and retrieve current balance

Create study timer component that tracks focused study time in 15-minute increments and awards +10 energy per completed interval. Display countdown timer with start/pause/stop controls using shadcn/ui Button components

requirements.summary: Add combo bonus system for consecutive correct answers
acceptanceCriteria: Combo counter tracks consecutive correct answers
Bonus energy increases with longer combos
Combo breaks when answer is incorrect
Visual feedback shows combo status during quiz

file_operations.description: Create combo tracker component displaying current combo count with animated counter and visual effects (sparks, multiplier badges) when combo milestones are reached. Show combo bonus energy calculation and reset indicator when combo breaks
Create custom hook to track consecutive correct answers, calculate combo bonus energy based on streak length, reset combo on incorrect answer, and manage combo state throughout quiz sessions

requirements.summary: Create energy spending system with unlockable items and mini-games
acceptanceCriteria: Energy shop displays unlockable items with energy costs
Five mini-games are available for unlock
Avatar customization options can be purchased with energy
Theme and sound pack unlocks are available
Tournament and mastery level unlocks work correctly
Energy balance updates when items are purchased

file_operations.description: Create energy shop component displaying unlockable items organized by category: mini-games (using generated icons from frontend/public/assets/generated/minigame-*.dim_256x256.png), avatar customizations, themes, sound packs, tournaments, and mastery levels. Each item shows energy cost, lock status, and purchase button using shadcn/ui Card and Button components
Create reusable shop item card component displaying item name, icon, description, energy cost, locked/unlocked state, and purchase button. Handle purchase transaction and energy deduction on click
Create custom hook to manage shop inventory, track owned items, handle purchase transactions with energy deduction, validate sufficient energy balance, and persist purchase history
Add route for EnergyShop component and wire navigation link from dashboard to shop page

requirements.summary: Implement daily quests, weekly missions, and time-limited events
acceptanceCriteria: Daily quests reset every 24 hours
Weekly missions reset every 7 days
Energy Boost Hours provide temporary multipliers
Seasonal events appear at appropriate times
Challenge progress is tracked and rewarded
Notification system alerts users to active events

file_operations.description: Create quests panel component displaying active daily quests and weekly missions with progress bars, completion status, and energy rewards. Show countdown timers for quest reset using shadcn/ui Card and Progress components
Create event banner component for displaying Energy Boost Hours, seasonal events, and limited-time challenges with animated badges, countdown timers, and call-to-action buttons
Create custom hook to manage quest state, track progress, award rewards upon completion, reset daily quests after 24 hours, reset weekly missions after 7 days, and persist quest data
Create custom hook to manage active events, trigger Energy Boost Hour multipliers, handle seasonal event logic, track challenge participation, and store event history

requirements.summary: Build comprehensive dashboard with all gamification elements
acceptanceCriteria: Animated energy bar shows current energy level
Streak counter displays consecutive days of activity
Daily goal tracker shows progress toward goals
Subject cards are clickable and show mastery level
Achievement shelf displays earned badges
Leaderboard can be toggled on/off for privacy
'Continue Learning' button suggests weak topics

file_operations.description: Create main dashboard component integrating EnergyMeter, StreakCounter, DailyGoalTracker, SubjectGrid, AchievementShelf, QuestsPanel, and ContinueLearningButton. Use background pattern images from frontend/public/assets/generated/dashboard-bg-light.dim_1920x1080.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/dashboard-bg-dark.dim_1920x1080.png based on theme. Layout components in a responsive grid using Tailwind CSS
Create streak counter component displaying consecutive days of activity with flame icon, current streak number, and bonus energy indicators. Animate counter updates with scale effects
Create daily goal tracker component showing progress toward daily learning goals with progress bar, percentage complete, and goal target using shadcn/ui Progress component

Create achievement shelf component displaying earned badges using generated badge images from frontend/public/assets/generated/badge-*.dim_256x256.png (brain-starter, energy-master, streak-hero, math-wizard, science-champ). Show locked badges as grayscale silhouettes. Include hover tooltips with badge descriptions

Create optional leaderboard component with privacy toggle showing top students by energy points. Include on/off switch using shadcn/ui Switch component and display rankings with anonymized usernames when enabled

Create 'Continue Learning' button component that analyzes weak topics using performance data and suggests next learning activity with AI-powered recommendations. Style as prominent call-to-action using shadcn/ui Button component
Create custom hook to track daily activity, calculate consecutive day streaks, award bonus energy for milestones, reset if day is missed, and persist streak data
Create custom hook to manage daily learning goals, track progress toward targets (questions answered, time studied, concepts mastered), calculate completion percentage, and reset goals at midnight
Add route for Dashboard component and configure it as the main authenticated view after onboarding completion

requirements.summary: Create learning system with multiple question types and adaptive difficulty
acceptanceCriteria: All six question types are implemented and functional
Quiz timer displays countdown when enabled
Difficulty adapts based on student performance
Instant explanation appears after each answer
Question types are grade-appropriate
Visual and diagram-based questions display correctly

file_operations.description: Create quiz view component that displays questions with adaptive difficulty, quiz timer, question counter, and navigation controls. Integrate all question type components and show instant explanations after each answer using shadcn/ui Card component for question container

Create multiple-choice question component displaying question text and 4 answer options as selectable buttons using shadcn/ui RadioGroup component. Highlight selected answer and show correct/incorrect state on submission
Create fill-in-the-blank question component with text input fields for missing words using shadcn/ui Input component. Support multiple blanks per question and validate answers on submission
Create match-the-following question component with drag-and-drop functionality to pair items from two columns. Use HTML5 drag-and-drop API with visual feedback for dragging state and drop targets
Create drag-and-drop activity component for arranging items into correct order or categories. Implement draggable items with drop zones and visual feedback using HTML5 drag-and-drop API

Create reasoning question component for higher grades displaying multi-step logical problems with text area for detailed answers using shadcn/ui Textarea component. Include character counter and formatting hints
Create diagram-based question component displaying images or diagrams with interactive hotspots or labeling tasks. Support click-to-label and drag-label-to-position interactions
Create quiz timer component displaying countdown in MM:SS format with progress ring visualization. Auto-submit quiz when time expires and show time warnings at 1 minute and 30 seconds remaining

Create explanation panel component displaying instant feedback after answer submission showing correct answer, detailed explanation, and related concept links. Include correct/incorrect indicator with smooth slide-in animation
Create custom hook to track answer accuracy, calculate performance metrics, adjust question difficulty level based on success rate, and maintain appropriate challenge level for student
Add route for QuizView component and wire navigation from subject cards and 'Continue Learning' button to quiz sessions

requirements.summary: Implement positive feedback system with encouraging messages
acceptanceCriteria: Correct answers display encouraging messages
Incorrect answers show constructive feedback
Feedback animations are smooth and non-intrusive
Tone remains friendly and age-appropriate
Multiple feedback variations prevent repetition

file_operations.description: Create feedback toast component displaying encouraging messages for correct answers ('Boom! That's brain power!', 'Amazing work!', 'You're on fire!') and constructive messages for incorrect answers ('Almost there! Let's review that concept together.', 'Great attempt! Try again.'). Use shadcn/ui Toast component with smooth slide-in animations and auto-dismiss after 3 seconds

Create utility module with arrays of positive and constructive feedback messages for randomized selection. Include age-appropriate variations for different grade levels and maintain friendly, motivating tone throughout

requirements.summary: Build mastery tracking system with spaced repetition
acceptanceCriteria: Each concept has a visual strength meter
Revision reminders appear for unmastered concepts
Spaced repetition algorithm schedules review sessions
'Practice Again' button targets weak topics
Mastery progress is saved and persistent

file_operations.description: Create mastery meter component displaying concept strength levels (Novice, Intermediate, Proficient, Master) with visual progress bar using color gradients from red to green. Show percentage mastery and recent practice history using shadcn/ui Progress component

Create revision reminder component displaying concepts due for review based on spaced repetition schedule. Show concept name, last practiced date, and 'Review Now' button using shadcn/ui Card component

Create 'Practice Again' smart button component that analyzes performance data to identify weakest topics and suggests targeted practice sessions. Display recommended concepts and estimated practice time using shadcn/ui Button component

Create custom hook to track concept mastery levels, calculate strength scores based on accuracy and recency, implement spaced repetition algorithm (increase interval on success, reset on failure), schedule revision reminders, and persist mastery data

requirements.summary: Create study resources with notes, summaries, and flashcards
acceptanceCriteria: Interactive notes are organized by subject and topic
Summary cards display key concepts clearly
Flashcards have smooth flip animations
Video placeholders are marked for future integration
All content is grade-appropriate

file_operations.description: Create interactive study notes component organized by subject and topic with expandable sections, search functionality, and bookmark capabilities. Use shadcn/ui Accordion component for collapsible sections and Card component for note containers
Create summary cards component displaying key concepts in digestible card format with clear headings, bullet points, and visual hierarchy. Use shadcn/ui Card component with hover effects

Create flashcard component with smooth 3D flip animation showing question on front and answer on back. Include navigation controls for previous/next card and shuffle option. Implement CSS transforms for flip animation
Create video placeholder component with thumbnail, topic title, duration indicator, and 'Coming Soon' badge. Style as disabled state to indicate future integration using shadcn/ui Card component
Create resources hub component integrating StudyNotes, SummaryCards, Flashcards, and VideoPlaceholder with tab navigation to switch between resource types using shadcn/ui Tabs component
Add route for ResourcesHub component and wire navigation link from dashboard and subject pages to resources hub

requirements.summary: Implement authentication with Internet Identity and parental controls
acceptanceCriteria: Users can authenticate via Internet Identity
Parental control portal is accessible with separate login
Screen-time limits are enforceable
Break reminders appear at configurable intervals
Progress reports can be viewed by authorized parents
All data handling follows child-safe privacy standards

file_operations.description: Create login page component with Internet Identity integration displaying login button and branding. Use the core-infrastructure component's authentication capabilities. Include 'Parent Login' link for parental control portal

Create parental control portal component with separate authentication flow showing child's progress reports, screen-time settings, break reminder configuration, and activity logs. Use shadcn/ui Tabs component for portal sections

Create screen-time settings component allowing parents to set daily time limits, configure break intervals, and enable/disable study time tracking. Use shadcn/ui Input and Switch components for controls

Create break reminder component displaying friendly message ('Quick 5-min break? Your brain deserves it!') when break interval is reached. Include snooze and take break options using shadcn/ui Dialog component

Create progress report component displaying weekly summary of time spent learning, topics studied, quiz scores, energy earned, and achievement milestones. Include export functionality for parents using shadcn/ui Card component for report sections

Create custom authentication hook integrating with Internet Identity from core-infrastructure component. Manage authentication state, handle login/logout, and store user session. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing
Create custom hook to track active screen time, enforce daily limits, trigger break reminders at configured intervals, and persist time tracking data with timestamps
Add routes for LoginPage and ParentPortal components. Implement authentication guard to redirect unauthenticated users to login page. Configure protected routes for authenticated content

requirements.summary: Ensure strict child-safety measures and content moderation
acceptanceCriteria: No third-party advertisements appear anywhere
All external links are blocked or educational-only
Content is verified to be age-appropriate
User data is encrypted and protected
Multiplayer features (if added) have moderation
Reporting mechanism is visible and functional

file_operations.description: Create content filter component that validates and sanitizes all user-generated content, blocks external URLs, and ensures educational-only links are permitted. Implement client-side validation rules

Create reporting mechanism button component visible on all content pages allowing users to report concerns. Include report form with categories and description field using shadcn/ui Dialog and Textarea components

Create content safety utility module with functions to validate content for age-appropriateness, sanitize HTML/text input, block external links except whitelisted educational domains, and flag inappropriate content for review

requirements.summary: Add comprehensive accessibility features
acceptanceCriteria: Text-to-speech works for all text content
Font size can be adjusted in settings
Dyslexia-friendly font option is available
Dark and light modes switch smoothly
Offline mode caches essential content
Low-data mode reduces resource loading

file_operations.description: Create text-to-speech component using Web Speech API to read aloud questions, content, and interface elements. Include play/pause/stop controls and speech rate adjustment using shadcn/ui Button components

Create accessibility settings page with font size slider, dyslexia-friendly font toggle, dark/light mode switch, offline mode toggle, and low-data mode toggle. Use shadcn/ui Slider, Switch, and RadioGroup components
Create custom theme hook to manage dark/light mode state, apply theme classes to root element, and persist theme preference in local storage. Support smooth transitions between themes
Create custom offline mode hook to cache essential content using browser storage APIs, detect network connectivity, and enable offline practice sessions with locally stored questions

Add CSS custom properties for font size scaling (--font-scale), dyslexia-friendly font family (OpenDyslexic or similar), dark mode color scheme variables, and smooth theme transition animations. Include media queries for system preference detection

requirements.summary: Create smooth pop-up notification system for achievements
acceptanceCriteria: All six pop-up types are implemented
Animations are smooth and professional
Pop-ups don't block critical UI elements
Users can dismiss pop-ups easily
Pop-ups queue properly when multiple events occur

file_operations.description: Create notification system component managing pop-up queue for Level Up, Concept Mastered, Energy Full, Streak Milestone, Achievement Unlocked, and Study Reminder events. Position notifications in corner with slide-in animations and auto-dismiss after 5 seconds using shadcn/ui Toast component
Create Level Up notification component displaying new level number with celebration animation and confetti effect. Include sound effect trigger and dismiss button
Create Concept Mastered notification component showing mastered concept name with checkmark animation and energy reward indicator
Create Energy Full notification component alerting user when energy meter reaches maximum capacity with glowing energy icon animation
Create Streak Milestone notification component displaying achieved streak number (7, 30, 100 days) with flame animation and bonus energy award
Create Achievement Unlocked notification component displaying badge icon from frontend/public/assets/generated/badge-*.dim_256x256.png with badge name and unlock animation using shine effect
Create Study Reminder notification component showing personalized reminder message with suggested topic and 'Start Learning' button
Create custom notifications hook to manage notification queue, trigger appropriate notification type based on event, handle auto-dismiss timers, and prevent notification spam with rate limiting

requirements.summary: Add supplementary learning tools and planners
acceptanceCriteria: Motivational quotes rotate on dashboard
Background music can be toggled and volume adjusted
Sound effects are customizable in settings
Focus mode hides non-essential UI elements
Exam countdown shows days remaining
Timetable planner allows schedule entry
Homework reminders send notifications
Goal-setting interface saves target scores

file_operations.description: Create motivational quote component displaying rotating inspirational quotes with smooth fade transitions. Include quote text, author, and refresh button using shadcn/ui Card component
Create audio settings component with background music toggle, volume slider, sound effects toggle, and individual effect volume controls. Use shadcn/ui Switch and Slider components

Create focus mode component that enters distraction-free view hiding navigation, sidebar, and non-essential UI elements. Show only current question and essential controls with minimal styling. Include exit focus mode button

Create exam countdown tracker component displaying days remaining until user-set exam date with progress visualization. Allow adding multiple exams with names and dates using shadcn/ui Card and DatePicker components

Create timetable planner component with weekly schedule grid allowing users to add study sessions, classes, and activities. Include time slots, subject selection, and color coding using shadcn/ui Table component

Create homework reminder component displaying list of assignments with due dates, completion status, and notification settings. Allow adding/editing homework entries using shadcn/ui Card and Checkbox components

Create goal-setting component allowing users to set target scores for subjects, track progress toward goals, and celebrate goal achievement. Include goal creation form and progress visualization using shadcn/ui Input and Progress components
Create tools hub component integrating ExamCountdown, TimetablePlanner, HomeworkReminder, and GoalSetting with tab navigation using shadcn/ui Tabs component
Create custom audio hook to manage background music playback, control volume levels, play sound effects for events, and persist audio preferences. Support multiple audio tracks and effect categories
Create motivational quotes utility module with curated array of age-appropriate inspirational quotes about learning, perseverance, and growth mindset. Include randomization function
Add route for ToolsHub component and wire navigation link from dashboard to tools section

requirements.summary: Design modern UI with brain and lightning theme
acceptanceCriteria: Visual design incorporates brain and lightning motifs
Color palette is vibrant but maintains readability
All animations run at 60fps on target devices
Typography is clear and age-appropriate
Navigation is intuitive for young users
UI adapts properly to mobile and desktop screens

file_operations.description: Create main app layout component with responsive navigation sidebar, top header with user info and energy meter, and content area. Include brain and lightning theme elements in header branding using generated images and Tailwind CSS utilities for responsive breakpoints

Create sidebar navigation component with links to Dashboard, Subjects, Resources, Shop, Tools, Settings, and Parent Portal. Include icons and active state highlighting. Collapse to icon-only on mobile using Tailwind responsive classes

Define custom color palette with vibrant energetic colors (electric blue accents, bright yellow highlights, purple gradients) balanced with neutral backgrounds for readability. Add brain and lightning theme utility classes. Configure smooth 60fps animations using CSS transforms and GPU-accelerated properties. Set up responsive typography scale using clamp() for fluid sizing

Extend Tailwind theme with custom colors for brain and lightning theme (primary: electric blue, secondary: energetic yellow, accent: purple gradient), custom animation keyframes for smooth transitions, spacing scale optimized for educational interface, and responsive breakpoints for mobile-first design

requirements.summary: Implement weekly performance analytics with insights
acceptanceCriteria: Weekly analytics page shows all required metrics
Accuracy percentage is calculated correctly
Time tracking is accurate and persistent
Improvement graphs display trend data
Algorithm identifies weakest topics
AI suggestions are contextually relevant

file_operations.description: Create analytics dashboard component displaying weekly performance summary with accuracy percentage, total time spent learning, improvement trend graphs, weak topic detection results, and AI study suggestions like 'Revise Algebra today'. Use shadcn/ui Card component for metric cards and integrate chart library for graphs
Create accuracy chart component displaying line graph of quiz accuracy percentage over time with week-over-week comparison and trend indicators
Create time spent chart component showing bar graph of daily study time throughout the week with subject breakdown and total hours summary
Create improvement graph component displaying multi-line chart tracking mastery level improvements across subjects over time with clear upward trend visualization

Create weak topics panel component listing concepts with lowest mastery scores, accuracy rates below threshold, and recommended practice time. Include 'Practice Now' buttons for each topic using shadcn/ui Card component

Create AI suggestions component displaying personalized study recommendations based on performance analysis (e.g., 'Revise Algebra today', 'Focus on Biology diagrams'). Show suggestion rationale and estimated benefit

Create custom analytics hook to aggregate performance data, calculate accuracy percentages, track time spent by subject, identify weak topics using threshold algorithms, generate improvement trends, and produce AI study suggestions based on performance patterns
Add route for AnalyticsDashboard component and wire navigation link from dashboard and user menu to analytics page

requirements.summary: Create achievement badge system with milestone unlocks
acceptanceCriteria: All specified badges are created with unique designs
Badge unlock conditions are defined and functional
Achievement shelf displays earned badges
Unlock animations celebrate achievement
Badge progress is tracked persistently

file_operations.description: Create badge display component showing individual achievement badge using generated images from frontend/public/assets/generated/badge-*.dim_256x256.png (brain-starter, energy-master, streak-hero, math-wizard, science-champ). Display badge in full color when earned or grayscale when locked. Include hover tooltip with badge description and unlock criteria using shadcn/ui Tooltip component

Create badge unlock animation component displaying celebration when badge is earned with badge image zoom-in effect, confetti particles, shine animation, and congratulatory message. Auto-dismiss after 3 seconds with manual dismiss option

Create custom achievements hook to track achievement progress, check unlock conditions (Brain Starter: complete onboarding, Energy Master: earn 1000 energy, 7-Day Streak Hero: maintain 7-day streak, Math Wizard: master 10 math concepts, Science Champ: master 10 science concepts), trigger unlock animations, and persist achievement data

requirements.summary: Add Olympiad preparation option with diagnostic quiz
acceptanceCriteria: Olympiad option is visible at top of dashboard
Information section explains Olympiad preparation clearly
5-question diagnostic quiz is available
Quiz assesses student's current level
Results provide guidance on Olympiad readiness

file_operations.description: Create Olympiad preparation banner component prominently displayed at top of dashboard using generated banner image from frontend/public/assets/generated/olympiad-banner.dim_800x200.png. Include 'Want to prepare for Olympiads?' headline and 'Learn More' button using shadcn/ui Card component

Create Olympiad information component explaining benefits of Olympiad preparation, competition formats, subjects covered, and success stories. Include 'Take Diagnostic Quiz' call-to-action button using shadcn/ui Card component

Create 5-question diagnostic quiz component assessing student's readiness for Olympiad preparation with challenging questions covering reasoning, logic, and subject knowledge. Display results with readiness score and personalized recommendations
Create Olympiad hub component integrating OlympiadInfo and DiagnosticQuiz with progress tracking, practice materials, and preparation resources
Add route for OlympiadHub component and wire navigation from OlympiadBanner on dashboard to Olympiad hub page

requirements.summary: Implement five unlockable mini-games with distinct mechanics
acceptanceCriteria: All five mini-games are fully playable
Each game has distinct mechanics and rules
Mini-games award energy and achievements
Games are locked until purchased with energy
Scores and progress are tracked for each game

file_operations.description: Create Word Rush mini-game (2D game) component with word/vocabulary challenges where players form words from letter tiles within time limit. Display score, timer, and word list using generated icon from frontend/public/assets/generated/minigame-word-rush.dim_256x256.png. Award energy based on words formed and difficulty

Create Math Blaster mini-game (2D game) component with fast-paced math challenges where players solve arithmetic problems before timer expires. Display falling number blocks that must be matched with correct answers using generated icon from frontend/public/assets/generated/minigame-math-blaster.dim_256x256.png. Award energy for speed and accuracy

Create Science Snap mini-game (2D game) component with science quiz format where players identify scientific concepts, match terms to definitions, and answer rapid-fire questions using generated icon from frontend/public/assets/generated/minigame-science-snap.dim_256x256.png. Award energy for correct answers and combo streaks

Create Memory Grid mini-game (2D game) component with memory matching game where players flip cards to find matching pairs within limited moves using generated icon from frontend/public/assets/generated/minigame-memory-grid.dim_256x256.png. Display grid of cards with flip animations. Award energy based on moves and time taken

Create Quiz Battle Mode mini-game (2D game) component with competitive quiz format featuring head-to-head quiz racing against timer and difficulty progression using generated icon from frontend/public/assets/generated/minigame-quiz-battle.dim_256x256.png. Display leaderboard and battle statistics. Award energy for wins and high scores

Create mini-games hub component displaying grid of all five mini-games with lock states (locked/unlocked), game icons from frontend/public/assets/generated/minigame-*.dim_256x256.png, descriptions, and play buttons. Show energy cost for locked games and high scores for unlocked games using shadcn/ui Card component
Create custom mini-games hook to track unlocked games, manage game state, record scores and progress, award energy and achievements for milestones, and persist game data
Add routes for MiniGamesHub and individual mini-game components. Wire navigation from dashboard and energy shop to mini-games hub
